name: Lazio (Italy)

colors.symbolism: the stylised regional logo, evoking the sky and the Tyrrhenian sea bordering Lazio

description: A white field charged at the centre with the stylised regional logo of Lazio, rendered in blue.
history: The current regional flag, defined alongside the modern regional graphic identity, follows the Regional Statute (Regional Law n. 1 of 11 November 2004). The stylised blue logo replaced earlier regional emblems based on a coat of arms with a Roman eagle.

features.symbolism: A white field charged with the stylised regional logo, a graphic composition in blue evoking sea, sky and the silhouette of a hill town.

features.role: stylised regional logo (a wave-like horizontal composition in blue)
features.symbolism: The blue stylised composition was designed as the modern visual identity of the region, evoking the Tyrrhenian coastline, the Tiber, and the rolling Lazio hills.
